rationale.R1.3: The agent thoroughly audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding text, identifying several unsupported claims and ensuring alignment.
rationale.R1.7: Flags one missing or wrong citation and questions the novelty claim, fitting the s=3 anchor.
rationale.RX.1: Clearly discloses uncertainty regarding citations and acknowledges reliance on memory for prior works.
rationale.RX.3: Output stays within the agreed scope without drifting, covering exactly what was requested.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content introduced; identifies potential issues in the original work.
rationale.RX.5: Traces major rewrites but not minor edits, aligning with s=3.
